creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
Are you here in Dubai this winter? Don’t miss this amazing spot! It’s called the Flag Garden in Jumeirah Umm Suqeim beach. 

🎟️ FREE entry
🇦🇪 This Dubai attraction is a part of Zayed and Rashid celebrations. From an aerial perspective, you’ll see a portrait of the founding fathers of the UAE.
⚠️ It will only be there until January, so make sure to drop by this season and celebrate your love for this beautiful country!
